name: Syntheteria: Core Game Loop — Atomic Implementation
description: Implement the core game loop for Syntheteria, a first-person 4X factory game on a machine planet. Each story is one testable unit of work with a vitest test file. The player grinds ore → compresses powder into cubes → grabs/carries cubes → stacks on grid → builds walls → assembles machines.

userStories.title: Rapier Raycast Utility Function
acceptanceCriteria: Returns `{ entityId, point, normal, distance }` on hit
Returns `null` on miss or distance > maxDistance
Test covers: hit returns correct data, miss returns null, exceeds maxDistance returns null

userStories.title: Selection State Manager
acceptanceCriteria: `onSelectionChange` fires callback with `{ newId, oldId }` on every change
Returns unsubscribe function that stops callbacks

userStories.title: Wire Raycast to Click Handler
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile single-tap works same as click
Test mocks `useFrame`/`useThree`, simulates click, verifies `setSelected` called

userStories.title: Action Registry (Trait-to-Action Mapping)
acceptanceCriteria: Returns empty array for unknown traits

userStories.title: Radial Action Menu Component
acceptanceCriteria: Renders action buttons in circular layout around given screen position
Each button has label text and calls `onAction(id)` on click
All buttons have minimum 44px touch target

userStories.title: OreDeposit Entity Spawner
acceptanceCriteria: `spawnOreDeposit` creates entity with OreDeposit data (type, quantity)
Entity has Rapier static body with sphere collider
Ore type matches one in `config/mining.json` oreTypes

userStories.title: Harvesting System (Grinding Rates)
acceptanceCriteria: `startHarvesting` begins powder transfer from deposit to player storage
Powder accumulates at `grindSpeed` rate per second (delta-based)
Deposit quantity decreases by same amount
Stops when player moves beyond 3.0m range

userStories.title: Compression System (Powder to Cube)
acceptanceCriteria: Returns true and begins timer if enough powder
Powder deducted from PowderStorage on start
On completion returns MaterialCube with correct material type
Cube has 0.5m dimensions and Grabbable trait

userStories.title: Grab Mechanic (Pick Up Cube)
acceptanceCriteria: `grabCube` returns false if cube not Grabbable
Returns false if out of reach (>2.0m)
Returns false if already holding a cube
Creates HeldBy relation on success, body to Kinematic
`throwCube` removes HeldBy, body to Dynamic, applies impulse
`getHeldCube` returns held cube ID or null

userStories.title: Held Cube Camera Follow
acceptanceCriteria: Held cube position set to camera forward offset (1.5m forward, 0.3m down)
No position update when not holding a cube

userStories.title: Grid Snap Math Utility
acceptanceCriteria: `snapToGrid` correctly snaps positions to 0.5m grid indices
All functions are pure with no side effects

userStories.title: Cube Placement with Structural Integrity
acceptanceCriteria: Returns valid if slot below is occupied (stacking)
Returns invalid for floating with no support
`placeCube` adds PlacedAt trait and sets body to Fixed

userStories.title: Place Cube from Hand onto Grid
userStories.description: Place Cube from Hand onto Grid
acceptanceCriteria: `getPlacementPreview` returns grid coords near raycast hit
Preview snaps to adjacent empty slot
Returns null if no surface in range
`placeHeldCube` drops cube then places at grid position
Returns false if not holding a cube

userStories.title: Furnace Entity and Hopper Input
acceptanceCriteria: `createFurnace` spawns entity with Hopper and Processor traits
Returns false if hopper full (5 max)
Removes cube entity from world on insert

userStories.title: Furnace Smelting Timer and Output
acceptanceCriteria: Timer does NOT advance when unpowered
Completion creates output cube at furnace output position
Next hopper item auto-starts after output

userStories.title: Wall Line Calculator (Bresenham)
acceptanceCriteria: Handles diagonal lines correctly via Bresenham
Height parameter controls wall Y levels

userStories.title: Wall Auto-Placement from Stockpile
acceptanceCriteria: Places cubes at each slot from wall plan
Cubes consumed from stockpileIds in order
Zero stockpile returns placed 0 and failed equals slot count
Each placed cube gets PlacedAt trait

userStories.title: 3D Pattern Matcher for Blueprints
acceptanceCriteria: `matchBlueprint` returns matching blueprint when pattern found

userStories.title: Machine Assembly (Cubes to Machine)
acceptanceCriteria: Creates Building entity at anchor position

userStories.title: Integration Test — Full Core Loop
acceptanceCriteria: Spawns ore deposit, harvests until enough powder
Compresses into cube, verifies MaterialCube entity
Places on grid, verifies PlacedAt trait
All assertions pass with real system functions
